name: snapshot_envelope_guard_trace_finalization

stateIO: Snapshot build responsibility moved into stateIO via buildSnapshotEnvelope()
normalizeSnapshotInput()/validateSnapshot() now unify snapshot-v1 and legacy-state import paths
lastApplySnapshot trace shape finalized with phase/reason/uiPolicy/sourceType/inputFormat fields
Reset trace now preserves caller reason instead of overwriting with generic reset reason
cloudState: Cloud build reduced to a thin wrapper around App.stateIO.buildSnapshotEnvelope({ source: 'cloud' })
Cloud validate/apply now reuse the shared stateIO normalize/validate/apply pipeline
Cloud snapshot now carries top-level meta and current appVersion
local: Local save switched from raw App.state export to versioned snapshot envelope export
Local restore now runs JSON parse -> normalize -> validate -> applySnapshot and rejects empty/invalid backups
Local restore messaging now matches managed UI restore semantics
auth: Logout/reset now passes sourceType='auth' so reset trace preserves caller context end-to-end

notes: preserve/snapshot/reset UI semantics are intentionally unchanged from v3.2.25.
calendar/activeTab restore scope was intentionally not expanded in this stage.
